meta.title: Camden Approach
meta.description: Camden street at night walking to The Albion. Three interactables then first choice.

nodes.speaker: system
nodes.text: Camden after dark. Rain on posters. Bass through brick. Someone has already said your name tonight, and you haven't opened your mouth once.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: You can still turn around. Nothing has happened yet. That is the mercy.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: No, look at that — the whole street is already framing you. Neon, puddle, silhouette. If this goes badly, at least it'll be cinematic.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: Check posture. Check coat. Check face. The first audience is always the glass.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: No guest name listed. Which means if you get in, you still don't exist. Not officially.

nodes.speaker: system
nodes.text: Three notifications. A missed call from a number you deleted but still recognise.

nodes.speaker: system
nodes.text: A text from Ash: 'Door's Mara tonight. Be nice or be interesting. Not both.'

nodes.speaker: system
nodes.text: An industry newsletter you subscribed to drunk and now can't unsubscribe from sober.

nodes.speaker: system
nodes.text: Twelve seconds of you walking. No caption. The algorithm will do the captioning.

nodes.speaker: system
nodes.text: Sent. Read receipt instant. No reply. Which is either very good or the kind of bad that announces itself later.

nodes.speaker: system
nodes.text: Hood up. Hands in pockets. The street doesn't notice. That used to bother you.
